spec.title: Sync Percentage - Consensus
spec.description: Sync percentage calculated as (local unsafe head / network received payload) * 100

spec.title: Sync Percentage - Execution
spec.description: Sync percentage calculated as (local unsafe head / network received payload) * 100

spec.title: Sync Percentage - Snap
spec.description: Sync percentage calculated as (local unsafe head / network received payload) * 100

spec.title: Log Counts - Consensus
spec.description: Log counts by level for consensus sync pods

spec.title: Log Counts - Execution
spec.description: Log counts by level for execution sync pods

spec.title: Log Counts - Snap
spec.description: Log counts by level for snap sync pods

spec.title: Snap Chain Download Progress
spec.description: Chain download sync percentage extracted from snap sync logs

spec.expr: max(last_over_time({namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$helm_release_prefix-snap-.*"} | json | msg="Syncing: chain download in progress" | line_format "{{.synced}}" | regexp `(?P<percent>[0-9.]+)%` | unwrap percent | __error__="" [$__auto]))

max(last_over_time({namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$helm_release_prefix-snap-.*"} | json | msg="Syncing: state download in progress" | line_format "{{.synced}}" | regexp `(?P<percent>[0-9.]+)%` | unwrap percent | __error__="" [$__auto]))
